initiatives.name: Lemon Tree's Free Food Directory
initiatives.description: Map of food pantries and distributions in the Richmond area.

initiatives.name: Food Coalition Resource Center (FCRC)
initiatives.description: A mutual aid collective coordinating food distribution and community support initiatives in Richmond. They organize direct assistance, resource sharing, and solidarity networks while building sustainable systems of community care through food justice and collective action.

initiatives.name: Food Not Bombs Richmond
initiatives.description: A mutual aid collective fostering food justice and community solidarity through free food sharing in Richmond. They coordinate regular meal distributions, food recovery initiatives, and solidarity networks while building power through direct action, community care, and creating spaces for food sovereignty and collective nourishment.

initiatives.name: Nationz Foundation
initiatives.description: Supporting the Greater Richmond LGBTQIA+ community with HIV and STI testing, linkage to care, and access to holistic wellness services. Operating out of Henrico

initiatives.name: Queer RVA
initiatives.description: Black, Indig, Queer + Trans youth-led org providing resources to RVAs lgbtq+ neighbors

initiatives.name: MADRVA
initiatives.description: MADRVA is a solidarity network of community members and organizations working together in Richmond, Virginia to help each other.

initiatives.name: RVA Community Fridges
initiatives.description: RVA Community Fridges is about more than free food. It's neighbors helping neighbors.

initiatives.name: Dirty South Trans Radicals
initiatives.description: POC-led and founded. A multiracial collective of individuals standing in resistance in the face of systemic oppression, violence, and hatred.

initiatives.name: Richmond Dissenters
initiatives.description: A new wave of young people turning the tide against endless war at home and abroad
